author: Jun Lim
description: Import posts from Naver Blog with AI-powered features, subscription management, and comprehensive content parsing - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: hyungyunlim
manifest.description: Import posts from Naver Blog, Cafe, News, and Kakao Brunch with AI-powered features, subscription management, and comprehensive content parsing.
manifest.name: Naver Blog Importer

name: Naver Blog Importer

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 한국어

- 가져오기 모달의 `Add to subscriptions` 토글 상태가 플러그인 리로드 후에도 유지되도록 수정했습니다.
- 토글을 변경하면 즉시 설정에 저장되며, 다음에 모달을 열 때 마지막 선택값을 기본값으로 사용합니다.
- 기존 사용자 설정에도 새 기본값이 안전하게 적용되도록 설정 보정 로직을 추가했습니다.

## English

- Fixed the `Add to subscriptions` toggle in the import modal so its state persists after plugin reloads.
- Toggle changes are now saved immediately and reused as the default value the next time the modal opens.
- Added settings normalization so existing user settings safely receive the new default value.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 한국어

- 네이버 블로그 전체 가져오기에서 마지막 페이지가 반복되는 경우를 감지해 중복 페이지 순회를 중단하도록 수정했습니다.
- 이미 가져온 글은 본문을 다시 가져오기 전에 제외해서 전체 가져오기 속도와 안정성을 개선했습니다.
- 대량 가져오기와 구독 동기화 결과에서 성공, 건너뜀, 오류 개수를 더 정확히 표시합니다.
- AI 설정은 켜져 있어도 사용 가능한 provider/API key가 없으면 태그/요약 생성을 건너뛰어 가져오기가 멈추는 문제를 줄였습니다.

## English

- Fixed the full Naver Blog import flow to stop when Naver repeats the last page, avoiding duplicate page traversal.
- Improved full import speed and reliability by excluding already-imported posts before fetching post content.
- Improved bulk import and subscription sync summaries with more accurate success, skipped, and error counts.
- Reduced import stalls when AI options are enabled but no usable provider/API key is configured by skipping AI tag/excerpt generation in that state.

releases.author: hyungyunlim
releases.description:
## What's fixed

Fixes the automated review-bot findings reported on the plugin's community listing.

### Required (errors) — resolved
- Bumped `minAppVersion` from `0.15.0` to `1.8.7` so the manifest matches the Obsidian APIs the plugin actually uses (`Vault.createFolder`, `getFrontMatterInfo`, `FileManager.trashFile`, `Notice.messageEl`, `Vault.getAllFolders`, `getLanguage`).
- Ended the manifest description with punctuation.
- Replaced the `builtin-modules` dependency with Node's built-in `module.builtinModules`.
- All UI timers now go through `window.setTimeout` for popout-window compatibility.
- Replaced `document.createDocumentFragment` / `document.createElement` with Obsidian's `createFragment` / `createDiv` helpers.
- Eliminated all 397 `@typescript-eslint/no-unsafe-*` errors: typed `catch (error)` blocks with `instanceof Error` narrowing, structurally typed every `JSON.parse` result and AI provider response (OpenAI / Anthropic / Google / Ollama), and added small inline interfaces for Brunch / Naver Blog / Cafe / News API shapes.

### Other cleanups
- Removed redundant `(item as Element)` type assertions in fetchers.
- Prefixed unused callback args with `_` to satisfy the lint pattern.
- Added an `eslint.config.mjs` with `eslint-plugin-obsidianmd` so the same checks the bot runs can be run locally.

Local `npx eslint .` now reports **0 errors, 0 warnings**.

releases.author: hyungyunlim
releases.description:
## Bug Fixes

- Fix Obsidian plugin review bot findings:
  - Remove Node.js `https` module usage; use Obsidian's `requestUrl` for all platforms
  - Remove unused eslint-disable directive and `require()` call
  - Fix sentence case for short URL resolving status text
  - Remove unused catch variables across multiple files
  - Remove unused `CAFE_ARTICLE_API_BASE` import

releases.author: hyungyunlim
releases.description:
## What's New

### Naver Short URL Resolution
- `naver.me`, `me2.do`, `han.gl` short URLs are now automatically resolved to their canonical destination
- Clipboard auto-fill recognizes short URLs
- Real-time "Resolving short URL..." badge in the import modal

### Art Token Forwarding (Member-only Cafe Articles)
- Shared cafe article links with `art` JWT tokens now work seamlessly
- The token is extracted from the URL and forwarded to the Naver Cafe API
- No additional configuration needed — just paste the shared link

### Developer
- Build artifacts auto-deploy to test vault on `npm run build`

releases.author: hyungyunlim
releases.description:
## New Platform: Kakao Brunch 🥐

Full support for importing posts from [Kakao Brunch](https://brunch.co.kr), Korea's popular writing platform.

### Brunch Features
- **Single post import**: Paste any `brunch.co.kr/@author/post` URL
- **Author bulk import**: Import all posts from an author's page
- **Keyword/Magazine pages**: Import posts from topic or magazine collections
- **Rich content support**: Images, videos, and embedded content
- **Comment parsing**: Optionally include comments in imported posts
- **Subscription system**: Subscribe to authors for easy syncing
- **Author metadata**: Profile image, name, title, description, subscriber count

## New Features

- 🏷️ **Naver Blog Tag API Integration**
  - Use Naver's native tag suggestions for better tag generation
  - Improved AI tag handling with fallback support

- 👤 **Enhanced Subscription UI**
  - Profile metadata display (avatar, nickname, bio) for Naver Blog subscriptions
  - Max posts count and subscribe toggle in import modal
  - Improved card layout with better spacing and typography

- 🔔 **Consolidated Startup Notifications**
  - Single "Syncing subscriptions..." notice instead of multiple notifications
  - Consolidated summary: "Sync completed: X from blogs, Y from Brunch"
  - Manual sync from settings still shows detailed progress

## Improvements

- Better bio display with proper line-height and word-break
- Improved subscription card CSS for multi-line content
- HTML entity cleanup in blog profile descriptions
- YAML frontmatter newline handling improvements

## Bug Fixes

- Fix subscription not being added when all posts are duplicates
- Fix subscription not working from import modal
- Remove debug console logs
releases.name: 1.9.0 - Kakao Brunch Support

releases.author: hyungyunlim
releases.description:
## New Features
- 🎬 **Video download support** for Naver Blog and Cafe posts
- New `VideoService` for downloading videos via Naver rmcnmv API
- Videos are saved locally with proper positioning in markdown

## Improvements  
- Fix cafe video order issue (videos now appear in correct DOM order)
- Extract vid/inkey from `data-module-v2` script tags
- Use `<!--VIDEO:vid-->` placeholder system for accurate video positioning

## Technical Details
- Both Blog and Cafe use the same video API: `apis.naver.com/rmcnmv/rmcnmv/vod/play/v2.0/{vid}`
- Videos are downloaded as MP4 files to the attachments folder
- Supports multiple videos per post with correct ordering
releases.name: 1.8.0 - Video Download Support

releases.author: hyungyunlim
releases.description:
## Changes

### Bug Fixes
- Fix sentence case in UI text to comply with Obsidian style guidelines
  - "Naver Cafe" → "Naver cafe"
  - "Naver News" → "Naver news"
  - Other UI text improvements
- Remove unused variables (progress, imageProgress, directUrl)
- Improve detection message formatting

### Code Quality
- Address ObsidianReviewBot feedback (round 6)

releases.author: hyungyunlim
releases.description:
## Changes

### Bug Fixes
- Fix object stringification in naver-cafe-fetcher.ts
  - Safely extract `commentId` to avoid `[object Object]` when the value is not a string/number
  - Added type checks before calling `String()` on potentially complex objects
- Use `FileManager.trashFile()` instead of `Vault.delete()` for file deletion
  - Follows Obsidian best practices for file deletion
  - Respects user's trash/delete preferences

### Code Quality
- Remove unused imports:
  - `Notice` from `naver-blog-fetcher.ts` and `google-client.ts`
  - `ImageService` from `import-modal.ts`
  - `App` from `locale-utils.ts`
- Remove unused variable `imageCount` from `naver-news-fetcher.ts`
- All changes address ObsidianReviewBot code review feedback (round 5)

releases.author: hyungyunlim
releases.description:
## Changes

### Bug Fixes
- Fix promise in void context issues in modal setTimeout callbacks
  - Changed async arrow functions to use `.then().catch()` pattern for proper promise handling
- Remove unnecessary non-null assertions (!) in settings-tab.ts
  - Modified `ensureCafeSettings()` and `ensureNewsSettings()` to return the settings object
  - Use returned object instead of accessing with `!` assertion
- Add missing `nidAut` and `nidSes` fields to NaverCafeSettings type definition

### Code Quality
- All changes address ObsidianReviewBot code review feedback (round 4)
- Improved TypeScript type safety without relying on non-null assertions
- Better promise handling patterns in event callbacks

releases.author: hyungyunlim
releases.description:
## Changes

### Bug Fixes
- Fix invalid 'never' type in template literals in API client factory and AI provider utils
- Fix unnecessary escape characters in regex patterns (cafe-endpoints.ts, cafe-service.ts)
- Replace direct style assignments with CSS classes in import modals
- Fix sentence case for UI text throughout the plugin
- Remove 'settings' from section headings to comply with Obsidian guidelines
- Add CSS detection styles for better maintainability

### Code Quality
- All changes address ObsidianReviewBot code review feedback (round 3)
- Improved TypeScript type safety
- Better separation of styles into CSS classes

releases.author: hyungyunlim
releases.description:
## Changes

### Code Quality Improvements (ObsidianReviewBot Feedback - Round 2)

- Remove unused debug code blocks (empty meta tag iteration in naver-blog-fetcher.ts)
- Remove unused `isErrorPost` variable in blog-service.ts
- Add descriptive comments to all remaining empty catch blocks
- Fix catch block formatting in image-service.ts
- Clean up extra blank lines in naver-blog-fetcher.ts

These changes continue to address feedback from the Obsidian plugin review process.

releases.author: hyungyunlim
releases.description:
## Changes

### Code Quality Improvements (ObsidianReviewBot Feedback)

- Replace `innerHTML` with Obsidian API methods (`createEl`, `appendText`) in cafe-import-modal.ts
- Add descriptive comments to empty catch blocks in naver-blog-fetcher.ts
- Remove unnecessary empty if block in `enhanceImageUrl` function
- Remove unused variable assignment in settings-tab.ts
- Apply sentence case to UI text (settings headers, ribbon tooltip)

These changes address the feedback from the Obsidian plugin review process.

releases.author: hyungyunlim
releases.description:
## Refactoring

- **Simplified cafe fetcher**: Removed Node.js `https` module dependency
- Now uses Obsidian's `requestUrl` with Cookie header for all platforms (desktop & mobile)
- Tested and confirmed working on both platforms
- Cleaner, more maintainable code (-40 lines)

releases.author: hyungyunlim
releases.description:
## Features

- **Mobile support for Naver Cafe**: Added fallback for iOS/Android devices
  - Uses `Platform.isMobile` to detect mobile environment
  - Conditionally loads Node.js `https` module (desktop only)
  - On mobile, uses Obsidian's `requestUrl` with Cookie header
  - Fixes crash on mobile due to missing Node.js APIs

## Notes

Cookie authentication on mobile may still be limited due to Capacitor/WebView restrictions (iOS 14+ blocks third-party cookies by default). Desktop remains the most reliable platform for cookie-based authentication.

releases.author: hyungyunlim
releases.description:
## Bug Fixes

- **Naver sticker/store images**: Added support for `storep-phinf.pstatic.net` domain images (stickers, emoticons from Naver store)
- These images now download properly with the required `type` parameter

releases.author: hyungyunlim
releases.description:
## Features

- **Cookie authentication error handling**: When importing from Naver Cafe without proper cookies, the plugin now shows a clear error message asking users to configure their Naver cookies in settings
- **Proactive cookie warning**: Shows a warning before attempting to import if no cookie is configured, helping users understand why imports might fail for private cafes

## Improvements

- Better error messages in Korean for Naver Cafe authentication issues
- Skip duplicate cookie warnings when syncing multiple subscribed cafes

releases.author: hyungyunlim
releases.description:
## Bug Fixes

- **Cafe scrap post ordering**: Fixed text and images appearing in wrong order (images were all at the end instead of interspersed with text)
- **Character encoding**: Fixed broken/garbled Unicode characters (���) in imported cafe posts
- **Blockquote formatting**: Fixed blockquote style incorrectly appearing on regular cafe posts (now only applies to actual scrap/shared posts)
- **Cafe image folder**: Cafe images now stored in cafe-specific attachments folder instead of blog attachments folder

releases.author: hyungyunlim
releases.description:
## Changes

### Naver Cafe Improvements
- Fix cafeName extraction from API response (`cafe.pcCafeName` or `cafe.name`)
- Use cafeName for subfolder naming instead of cafeUrl
- Improve HTML parsing selectors for cafeName extraction
- Pass subscription cafeName through sync process

### Cookie Settings UI (from 1.5.1)
- Separate NID_AUT and NID_SES input fields for easier configuration
- Auto-clean cookie value prefixes
- Improved UX consistency

### Bug Fixes
- Fix "Invalid character in header content" error for cookies with special characters
- Fix YouTube embed parsing to use Obsidian native embed syntax

releases.author: hyungyunlim
releases.description:
## What's New

### Features
- **Delete note with images command**: New command palette action to delete a note along with all its embedded images
  - Access via `Cmd+P` → "Delete note with embedded images"
  - Supports standard markdown images `![alt](path)`
  - Supports Obsidian wiki-style images `![[path]]`
  - Uses `imageFolder` setting to resolve attachment paths
  - Multiple path resolution strategies for flexible image location

### Improvements
- Smart image path resolution that works with various folder configurations

---
🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
releases.name: v1.5.1

releases.author: hyungyunlim
releases.description:
## What's New

### Features
- **Auto-open imported notes**: Notes are now automatically opened after import completion
  - Single post import: Opens the imported note immediately
  - Bulk import: Opens the last imported note after completion

- **PostView.naver URL support**: Now supports the desktop query parameter URL format
  - `https://blog.naver.com/PostView.naver?blogId=xxx&logNo=xxx`
  - Also supports legacy `PostView.nhn` format

### Improvements
- Improved URL parsing for various Naver blog URL formats
- Better handling of desktop blog URLs with query parameters

---
🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
releases.name: v1.5.0

releases.author: hyungyunlim
releases.description:
## What's New

### 🎬 Naver Video Content Handling
- Naver GIF-to-MP4 videos (`mblogvideo-phinf.pstatic.net`) are now properly detected
- Video content is converted to clickable links instead of broken images
- Format: `[동영상](video_url)` - click to view in browser

### Changes
- Video CDN URLs are no longer treated as downloadable images
- Improved handling of Naver's GIF-to-MP4 conversion format
releases.name: v1.4.9

releases.author: hyungyunlim
releases.description:
## What's New

### 🎬 Naver Video/GIF CDN Support
- Added support for downloading videos and GIFs from `mblogvideo-phinf.pstatic.net`
- Content GIFs from Naver's video CDN are now properly downloaded
- UI element GIFs are still filtered out via specific patterns

### Changes
- Added `mblogvideo-phinf.pstatic.net` to valid image domains
- Updated image extension validation to include `.gif`
- Improved GIF filtering logic to allow content GIFs while blocking UI GIFs
releases.name: v1.4.8

releases.author: hyungyunlim
releases.description:
## Changes

### OG Link Preview Support
- Added parsing for `se-oglink` (링크 미리보기) components
- Extracts title, summary, URL, and domain
- Displays as a formatted blockquote

### Example Output
```markdown
> 🔗 **[TÔM HOUSE (해산물 맛집) 똠 하우스 · Kien Giang, Phu Quoc](https://maps.app.goo.gl/...)**
> Find local businesses, view maps and get driving directions in Google Maps.
> *maps.app.goo.gl*
```
releases.name: v1.4.7

releases.author: hyungyunlim
releases.description:
## Changes

### File Attachment Support
- Added parsing for `se-file` (첨부파일) components
- Extracts file name, extension, and download link
- Displays as: 📎 [베트남 푸꾸옥 5박 7일 여행일정표.xlsx](download_url)

### Example Output
```markdown
📎 [베트남 푸꾸옥 5박 7일 여행일정표.xlsx](https://download.blog.naver.com/open/...)
```
releases.name: v1.4.6

releases.author: hyungyunlim
releases.description:
## Changes

### Image Group (Slideshow) Support
- Added parsing for `se-imageGroup` components (carousel/slideshow images)
- Extracts all images from slideshow containers
- Supports group captions

### Previously in v1.4.4
- Real-time input detection in import modal
- Blog home URL support for bulk import
- Merged import and single-post modals
releases.name: v1.4.5

releases.author: hyungyunlim
releases.description:
## Changes

### Merged Import Modals (v1.4.2)
- Combined ribbon icon modal and single post modal into one unified modal
- Single modal now handles both blog ID (bulk import) and post URL (single import)
- Clipboard auto-fill when modal opens with Naver blog URL
- Removed redundant single post command

### Blog Home URL Support (v1.4.3)
- Support blog home URLs like `https://blog.naver.com/blogid/` for bulk import
- Falls back to blogId extraction when no logNo in URL

### Real-time Input Detection (v1.4.4)
- Show detection status below input field
- 📄 Single post detection with blogId and logNo
- 📚 Bulk import detection with blogId
- ⚠️ Invalid format warning
- Simplified UI with placeholder guidance instead of examples

## Supported Input Formats
| Input | Action |
|-------|--------|
| `blogid` | Bulk import all posts |
| `https://blog.naver.com/blogid/` | Bulk import all posts |
| `https://blog.naver.com/blogid/123456789` | Single post import |
| `https://m.blog.naver.com/PostView.naver?blogId=xxx&logNo=xxx` | Single post import |
releases.name: v1.4.4

releases.author: hyungyunlim
releases.description:
## What's New

### Features
- **Paste to Import**: Paste a Naver Blog URL in the editor to automatically import the post
- Works on both desktop and mobile Obsidian
- Supports all URL formats (desktop, m.blog.naver.com, m.naver.com)

### Technical
- Added `url-utils.ts` for reusable URL parsing
- Uses Obsidian's `editor-paste` event API

## Installation

Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` to your vault's `.obsidian/plugins/naver-blog-importer/` folder.
releases.name: v1.4.1 - Paste URL to Import

releases.author: hyungyunlim
releases.description:
## What's New ### Features - **m.naver.com URL Support**: Import posts from mobile Naver URLs - **BlogId Subfolder**: Posts now saved under `{folder}/{blogId}/{title}.md` - **BlogId in Frontmatter**: Added `blogId` field to YAML metadata - **Original Tags Support**: Parse tags from blog post (when available) ### Fixes - **Text Content Parsing**: Fixed bug where text was skipped when lists were present - Now processes `

`, `

    `, `
      ` in correct DOM order ### Changes - Simplified README documentation - Removed unused playwright dependency ## Installation Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` to your vault's `.obsidian/plugins/naver-blog-importer/` folder.
releases.name: v1.4.0 - Improved Parsing & Folder Structure

releases.author: hyungyunlim
releases.description:
## Bug Fixes
- Fix "Promise in void context" ESLint warning by using void operator pattern for async event listener

## Technical Details
Changed `addEventListener('click', async () => {...})` to `addEventListener('click', () => { void (async () => {...})(); })` to follow Obsidian's standard pattern where addEventListener expects void return.

releases.name: v1.3.3

releases.author: hyungyunlim
releases.description:
## ✅ Sentence Case Corrections

This release fixes all sentence case issues for UI text.

### What is Sentence Case?
- First letter capitalized, rest lowercase
- Proper nouns kept: **OpenAI**, **Naver**
- Acronyms kept uppercase: **API**, **URL**
- Lowercase after colons (unless new sentence)
- User-facing text, not code variable names

### Fixed Issues

**Colon Capitalization:**
- `Sync completed: No new posts` → `Sync completed: no new posts`

**Programming Terms to User Text:**
- `LogNo` → `log number` (2 locations)
  - More user-friendly
  - Follows Obsidian UI guidelines

### Build Status
✅ All checks pass

This completes all sentence case corrections requested by the linter.

---
🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

releases.author: hyungyunlim
releases.description:
## 🔧 Final ESLint Fixes

This release addresses all remaining issues from the v1.2.9 scan by ObsidianReviewBot.

### Critical Fixes

**Unexpected Await (2 locations)**
- Removed `await` from `loadTranslations()` call - method is now synchronous
- Removed `await` from `getExistingLogNos()` call - method returns Set directly

**Type Safety (3 locations)**
- Fixed `any` type in `naver-blog-fetcher.ts` with proper type assertion
- Reverted problematic `never` type assertions causing template literal errors
- Proper error throwing without type assertions

**Empty Block Statements (2 locations)**
- Added meaningful comments to empty catch blocks in `blog-service.ts`
- Improved error handling clarity

### Code Cleanup

**Unused Variables Removed:**
- Meta tag processing variables (`name`, `property`, `content`)
- Progress tracking variable
- Count variables (`blogSuccessCount`, `blogErrorLogCount`, `blogErrorCount`)
- Underscore assignment in settings-tab.ts

**Unused Imports Removed:**
- `App` from locale-utils.ts
- `Notice` from google-client.ts

### Known Non-Issue

**Promise in Void Context:**
- Async event listener pattern is standard in Obsidian plugins
- Does not cause runtime issues
- May request `/skip` if flagged again

### Build Status
✅ TypeScript compilation: **PASS**
✅ No errors or warnings

This version resolves all critical Required issues. Optional warnings about async event listeners are standard Obsidian plugin patterns.

---

releases.name: v1.2.9 - All ESLint Issues Resolved

releases.author: hyungyunlim
releases.description:
## ✅ Complete ESLint Compliance

This release addresses **all required and optional ESLint issues** from the Obsidian plugin review:

### Type Safety Issues Fixed
- **Union type fix**: Removed `Error | unknown` → `unknown` (unknown overrides Error)
- **Any type fix**: Added proper type assertion for dataAttrs
- **Never type fix**: Fixed template literal types in default cases

### Code Quality Improvements
- **Regex patterns**: Removed unnecessary escape characters (\\/ → /)
- **Case blocks**: Added braces to lexical declarations in switch cases
- **Type assertions**: Removed unnecessary type assertion in settings-tab.ts

### Cleanup (All Unused Code Removed)
**Unused Imports:**
- main.ts: Removed `App`
- locale-utils.ts: Removed `App`
- google-client.ts: Removed `Notice`
- blog-service.ts: Removed `BlogSubscription`

**Unused Variables:**
- Removed all commented-out count variables (blogSuccessCount, blogErrorLogCount, blogErrorCount)
- Removed unused error variables from catch blocks
- Removed unused progress variable
- Fixed underscore assignments in settings-tab.ts

### Previously Fixed (v1.2.7 commits)

releases.description:
## 🎉 Release 1.2.4

### 🐛 Bug Fix

This release properly addresses the Notice handling feedback from the Obsidian team:

#### Notice Handling Fix
- ✅ **Removed `as any` type casting** - Now uses `cancelNotice.messageEl` directly
- ✅ **Added @ts-ignore comment** - To suppress TypeScript error while following Obsidian's recommendation
- ✅ **Exact implementation as requested** - Following the specific code pattern suggested by the review team

### 📝 Previous Changes
All previous improvements from v1.2.3 are included:
- Fixed text capitalization throughout UI
- Removed redundant "settings" text from headings
- Removed unused translation strings
- Proper TypeScript types throughout
- Vault API usage instead of deprecated Adapter API
- No unnecessary network headers

### 📦 Installation

Install directly from Obsidian's Community Plugins browser or download the files manually.

### 🙏 Acknowledgments

Special thanks to [@Zachatoo](https://github.com/Zachatoo) for the patient and detailed review feedback.
releases.name: Release 1.2.4

releases.author: hyungyunlim
releases.description:
## 🎉 Release 1.2.3

### 🐛 Bug Fixes & Improvements

This release addresses additional feedback from the Obsidian team's review:

#### Code Improvements
- ✅ **Fixed Notice handling** - Now uses `messageEl` property directly instead of DOM queries
- ✅ **Simplified headings** - Removed redundant "settings" text from AI heading (now just "AI")
- ✅ **Cleaned up translations** - Removed unused 'title' translation line

#### Previous Fixes (from 1.2.2)
- Fixed text capitalization to use sentence case throughout
- Replaced all `any` types with proper TypeScript types
- Switched from deprecated Adapter API to recommended Vault API
- Uses Obsidian's `getFrontMatterInfo()` for frontmatter parsing
- Removed unnecessary User-Agent and Referer headers

### 📦 Installation

Install directly from Obsidian's Community Plugins browser or download the files manually.

### 🙏 Thanks

Thanks again to [@Zachatoo](https://github.com/Zachatoo) for the detailed review and follow-up feedback!
releases.name: Release 1.2.3

releases.author: hyungyunlim
releases.description:
## 🎉 Release v1.2.2

### 🐛 Bug Fixes & Improvements

This release addresses all feedback from the Obsidian team's review (PR #7091):

#### UI/UX Improvements
- ✅ **Fixed text capitalization** - All UI text now uses proper sentence case
- ✅ **Removed redundant text** - Cleaned up "Configuration" and similar redundant words from settings

#### Code Quality
- ✅ **TypeScript improvements** - Replaced all `any` types with proper type definitions
- ✅ **API compliance** - Switched from deprecated Adapter API to recommended Vault API
- ✅ **Better frontmatter parsing** - Now using Obsidian's `getFrontMatterInfo()` function
- ✅ **Network optimization** - Removed unnecessary User-Agent and Referer headers

#### Technical Details
- Uses `getAbstractFileByPath()` instead of `adapter.exists()`
- Uses `createBinary()` instead of `adapter.writeBinary()`
- Properly typed all modal and service constructors
- Improved error handling with proper type guards

### 📦 Installation

Install directly from Obsidian's Community Plugins browser or download the files manually.

### 🙏 Thanks

Special thanks to [@Zachatoo](https://github.com/Zachatoo) for the thorough review!

releases.author: hyungyunlim
releases.description:
## 🔄 주요 개선사항

### 📁 리포지토리 구조 개선
- **깔끔한 구조**: 플러그인 파일들을 루트 디렉터리로 이동
- **중복 제거**: 기존 obsidian-naver-blog-plugin 폴더 완전 삭제
- **보안 강화**: API 키가 포함된 파일들 제거
- **한글 README**: GitHub 메인 페이지에 한글 README 정상 표시

### 🎨 UI 개선
- **폴더 입력 필드**: 아이콘과 placeholder 텍스트 겹침 현상 수정
- **레이아웃 정렬**: 검색 아이콘과 clear 버튼 정확한 위치 배치
- **사용성 향상**: 더 직관적이고 깔끔한 설정 화면

### 🧹 코드 정리
- **불필요한 파일 제거**: poetry.lock, pyproject.toml 등 Python 관련 파일 삭제
- **일관성 개선**: TypeScript/JavaScript 기반 프로젝트로 통일
- **.gitignore 업데이트**: 레거시 파일들 적절한 관리

## 📁 포함된 파일

- main.js - 메인 플러그인 파일
- manifest.json - 플러그인 매니페스트
- styles.css - 개선된 스타일시트

## 📋 전체 변경사항

모든 변경사항은 [전체 변경로그](https://github.com/hyungyunlim/obsidian-naver-blog-importer/compare/v1.2.0...v1.2.1)에서 확인하실 수 있습니다.
